specific_question: By how many days did Elexion Automotive's training program reduce time-to-proficiency for sales representatives?
answer: In May 2023, Elexion Automotive launched a sales training program that reduced time-to-proficiency for new sales representatives by 14 days.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
